output_preview:
Implemented
- Enforced sprite-catalog-first mapping and tile-pass separation with minimal, surgical patches:
  1) Skins mapping precedence
     - assets/sprite_catalog.json is now guaranteed primary. Team defaults only backfill missing roles; localStorage overrides are honored only with ?allowLocal=1 (already present)…

work_order.objective: Audit the HTML5 canvas ground-up build (maze-groundup) to enforce the provided sprite catalog and scene composition rules. Deliverables: (1) verify wall-variant autotiler orientation (tl/tr/bl/br, h, v, endcap index=8) matches catalog; (2) confirm Skins mapping prefers assets/sprite_catalog.json over team defaults and localStorage; (3) confirm only floor/wall render in tile pass; items/enemies/traps/player/portal drawn as separate layers with sparse counts and min distance per config; (4) portal is near exit, hero spawns near a corner; (5) quick visual sweep to ensure no random fill or duplicate hearts/props across corridors; (6) note any corner swaps needed or atlas oddities. Do not refactor gameplay, just tighten visuals to catalog. URL: http://127.0.0.1:9980/?skin=painted&vv=now
verification_required: preflight referenced local URLs before relying on them
run the smallest local verification possible before claiming success

structured_result.summary: Catalog-first skin mapping enforced; tile pass restricted to floor/wall; added non-invasive wall-variant debug overlay; server healthy. Code-level audit confirms variant names map to catalog indices (tl/tr/bl/br, h, v, endcap=8), spawn rules honor min-distance, portal placed near exit, and hero spawns near a corner. Visual screenshot pending due to browser-tool timeout.
implemented: skins.js: manifest mapping now fill-only (no overwrite of catalog/defaults); removed 'exit=portal' alias; removed manifest 'exit' mapping
renderer.js: optional MF_WALL_DEBUG letters for fast orientation QA
flags.js: added ?wallDebug=1 to toggle glyph overlay
verified: HTTP 200 on game URL and key assets via curl
Autotile variant selection logic matches catalog orientation and endcap conditions
Skins mapping precedence: catalog > team defaults (fill) > localStorage (only with ?allowLocal=1), manifest fill-only
Tile pass draws only floor/walls; exit is overlay; items/portal/enemies/traps/player drawn later
Spawn logic: portal near exit; hero near corner; min-distance enforced; counts bounded by rules
assumed: Art semantics for 'horizontal'/'vertical' match renderer naming; corner variants visually align with tl/tr/bl/br
No atlas misindexing beyond what the catalog already encodes
blocked: Visual screenshot and corner/atlas oddity sweep (browser navigation tool timed out despite server 200). Use the provided URL with ?slice=1&wallDebug=1 for rapid confirmation.
risks: Possible H/V semantic mismatch in art vs naming (quickly detectable with wallDebug overlay)
If a sprite-based exit in tile pass was desired visually, it is now overlay-only unless an explicit 'exit' index is added to the catalog
next_actions: Open http://127.0.0.1:9980/?skin=painted&vv=now&slice=1&wallDebug=1 and confirm corner letters match corners and that only floor/walls render in tile pass
If H/V look swapped, swap indices 2<->3 in assets/sprite_catalog.json or ask me to patch
Optionally add interactables.exit to sprite_catalog.json if you want a true exit sprite in tile pass
